note: LOTTERY AUDIT corrections: (1) cooldown column now lists recent MINERS (the actual exclusion key in compute_lottery_eligibility_set), not lottery winners — winning the lottery does NOT trigger cooldown, mining a recent block does. (2) RPC fetch is now bounded-concurrency (8 in flight) with incremental row rendering, so the audit will not freeze the browser or spike the node when there are thousands of PAYOUT blocks. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
